name: _DoIP_UDPInd
title: _DoIP_UDPInd
syntax: long _DoIP_UDPInd( char IPaddress[], WORD port, BYTE data[]);
description: An UDP packet was received. All packets are forwarded to this callback function, and it can decide whether processing of the packet stops, or is continued.
The sender IP address and source port is given as first arguments.
This callback is called for every packet before any other processing is per-formed. If only packets unknown to the DoIP implementation shall be processed, use _DoIP_UDPDataInd.

parameters.name: IPaddress
parameters.description: Address in text form, e.g. “169.254.32.1” (IPv4) or “2001::1” (IPv6).

return: 0: Continue normal processing of the packet.
